description: Fragment of a list of recipients of alms, similar to Bodl. MS heb. c28.24, in the hand, it seems, of the judge Yeshu'a ha-Kohen b. Yosef of Alexandria (dated documents 1028 through after 1062). (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 454, App. B 55 [dated to 1040-1080]).
description_he: קטע רשימת מקבלי צדקה בכתב השופט ישועה הכהן בן יוסף מאלכסנדריה, 1040-1080
